case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ARMIN PARYAVI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-08-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PARYAVI, ARMIN DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-27-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-30-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-04-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62298893)
